headline: Talen Energy Corporation (TLN) Surges 5.3%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Talen Energy Corporation (TLN) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
